name: dow-sga-browser
description: Bun bundles js/three-global.js and js/main.js into dist/. Use bun dev (watch + serve) or bun run preview (build + serve).

scripts.build: bun build js/three-global.js --outdir=dist --target=browser --minify --sourcemap && bun build js/main.js --outdir=dist --target=browser --minify --sourcemap
scripts.preview: bun run build && bun run serve.ts
